description_long: This object is a handheld electronic device with a rugged, orange-brown casing and a circular, mesh-covered antenna or sensor that folds up from the main body. The front panel features a green-tinted circular display, a digital screen, several physical buttons, and a rotary dial, suggesting it is used for detection or measurement purposes. The mesh component is attached with a hinge, allowing it to be positioned upright or folded flat. The casing appears to be made of a durable plastic or composite material, with visible screws and seams for assembly. There are ports and connectors on the lower edge, indicating data or power connectivity. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for field use in urban environments.
description: A rugged, handheld electronic device with a circular mesh antenna, digital display, buttons, and a rotary dial, housed in an orange-brown casing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular mesh antenna upright, the green-tinted circular display, digital screen, buttons, and rotary dial.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the device, the hinge mechanism for the mesh antenna, and the profile of the controls.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the mesh antenna, partially obscuring the main body and controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hinge, the edge of the circular display, and the side profile of the casing and controls.
